prompt:
ultrawork + ralph [Implement the 6 Intelligence modules and 
navigation restructure for Regulex Intelligence.

Read BOTH of the following files completely before 
writing a single line of code:
1. design-system/MASTER.md (base design system)
2. design-system/MASTER.md section "INTELLIGENCE MODULES 
   — DESIGN EXTENSION" (module-specific specs)

The implementation must match both documents exactly.

---

## PHASE 1: NAVIGATION RESTRUCTURE

1a. Update components/dashboard/sidebar.tsx

Change sidebar section labels from:
  OVERVIEW / INTELLIGENCE / SYSTEM
To:
  OVERVIEW / INTELLIGENCE / SYSTEM INTEGRATIONS

Add 6 new nav items under INTELLIGENCE section:
  IFA Prioritisation → /intelligence/ifa-prioritisation
  Competitive Positioning → /intelligence/competitive-positioning
  Partnership Intelligence → /intelligence/partnership-intelligence
  Market Intelligence → /intelligence/market-intelligence
  Platform Flow → /intelligence/platform-flow
  AI Research → /intelligence/ai-research

INTELLIGENCE section label:
  Add "BETA" badge inline after the label text.
  Badge spec from MASTER.md Extension Section A.

Icons (lucide-react, 16px, stroke-width 1.5):
  IFA Prioritisation: Target
  Competitive Positioning: BarChart2
  Partnership Intelligence: Link
  Market Intelligence: Zap
  Platform Flow: GitBranch
  AI Research: SearchCode

Rename "SYSTEM" section label to "SYSTEM INTEGRATIONS".

1b. Verify all existing nav items still work.
    No regressions on Morning Brief, Priority Queue, etc.

---

## PHASE 2: SHARED COMPONENTS

Build these before any module pages.
They are used across multiple Intelligence modules.

**2a. components/intelligence/layer-status-badge.tsx**
Props: status: "live" | "building" | "licensed"
  layer: number (1 | 2 | 3)
  label?: string (override text)
Three variants per MASTER.md Extension Section B.
Icons: CircleDot (live), Clock (building), Lock (licensed)
Colours: success / warning / neutral per spec.

**2b. components/intelligence/layer-tab-bar.tsx**
Props: layers: {number, label, status}[]
  activeLayer: number
  onLayerChange: (n: number) => void
Shows Layer 1, Layer 2, Layer 3 tabs with status badges.
Underline tab style (same as existing tabs).
Status badge right of each tab label.
Muted (not disabled) for non-Live tabs.

**2c. components/intelligence/layer-content-wrapper.tsx**
Props: status: "live" | "building" | "licensed"
  quarterLabel?: string (e.g., "Q2 2026")
  children: ReactNode
  licenseProvider?: string[]
If status === "live": renders children normally.
If status === "building": renders children with:
  overlay: bg-white/60, backdrop-blur-[1px]
  centred callout: Clock icon + "Building — [quarter]" 
  body-sm, text-secondary.
If status === "licensed": renders locked state card:
  Lock icon, provider list, "Register Interest" link.
  amber border-left card per spec.

**2d. components/intelligence/module-header.tsx**
Props: title, description, dataSourcesConfig
Renders module title, description, "Public Data Only" badge,
and "Data Sources" button that opens the slide-over.
Per MASTER.md Extension Section C item 1.

**2e. components/intelligence/data-sources-panel.tsx**
Props: isOpen, onClose, sources: DataSource[], moduleName
DataSource type: { name, purpose, layer, cost, legalStatus }
Slide-over panel, 420px, right-anchored.
Full spec per MASTER.md Extension Section E.
Uses Framer Motion: x from 420 to 0 on open, 
  opacity 0 to 1. Duration 200ms easeOut.

**2f. components/intelligence/outreach-draft-modal.tsx**
Props: isOpen, onClose, context, mandateName, draftText
Centred modal, 600px width.
Editable textarea with copy and email-client buttons.
Per MASTER.md Extension Section E.

**2g. components/intelligence/data-freshness-strip.tsx**
Props: sources: {name, lastUpdated}[]
Bottom-of-module strip.
Geist Mono caption style, text-tertiary.
Comma-separated: "FCA Register: 2h ago · Companies House: 4h ago"

**2h. lib/intelligence-mock-data.ts**
Create this file with all mock data for all 6 modules.
Do NOT put mock data inline in components.
Structure:

export const ifaRankings: IFAFirm[] = [...]  // 25 firms
export const peerGroupFunds: CompetitorFund[] = [...]  // 8 funds
export const platformPresence: PlatformRow[] = [...]  // 8 platforms
export const partnerships: Partnership[] = [...]  // 3 partnerships
export const marketEvents: MarketEvent[] = [...]  // 8 events
export const iaSectorFlows: SectorFlow[] = [...]  // 12 months
export const platformAUM: PlatformAUM[] = [...]  // 8 platforms
export const suggestedQueries: string[] = [...]  // 8 queries

All data from MASTER.md Extension Section D mock data.
UK-specific. Industry-accurate. Geist Mono values throughout.

---

## PHASE 3: MODULE PAGES

Build all 6 pages. Each page:
- Uses layout shell (sidebar + topbar already in place)
- Imports module-header, layer-tab-bar, layer-content-wrapper,
  data-freshness-strip from Phase 2
- Wraps content in Framer Motion page transition 
  (per existing MASTER.md Section 8 item 1)
- Uses only CSS variable tokens, never raw Tailwind colours

**3a. app/intelligence/ifa-prioritisation/page.tsx**

State:
  selectedMandate: string (default "Global Systematic")
  selectedRegion: string (default "All UK")
  selectedFirmType: string (default "All")
  selectedAUMBand: string (default "Any")
  selectedSignalFilter: string (default "All")
  expandedRow: string | null (IFA firm id)
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3 (default 1)

Layer 1 content:
  Filter bar (5 controls, flex row, compact)
  Universe stats strip: 
    "10,847 IFAs in universe · 847 match criteria · 
     23 have new signals this week"
    Amber on "23"
  
  Ranked table (25 rows, show all):
    Columns per MASTER.md spec
    Expandable row: clicking a row toggles 3-column 
    detail panel below that row
    Detail panel: firm profile | signals | fit breakdown
    "Build Brief" button in detail panel opens 
    outreach-draft-modal with pre-filled context
  
Layer 2: layer-content-wrapper status="building" 
  quarterLabel="Q2 2026"
  Children: greyed preview of relevance score breakdown UI
  
Layer 3: layer-content-wrapper status="licensed"
  licenseProvider={["Defaqto", "LinkedIn Sales Navigator"]}

Data freshness strip:
  FCA Register: 2h ago
  Companies House: 4h ago
  FT Adviser: 35s ago

**3b. app/intelligence/competitive-positioning/page.tsx**

State:
  selectedMandate: string (default "Global Systematic")
  selectedCompetitor: string | null
  isPanelOpen: boolean
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3

Layer 1 content:
  Mandate selector (consistent with Module 1)
  
  Peer group table:
    8 rows (Keyridge highlighted with amber left border + 
    "You" badge)
    "View Brief" button on each competitor row
    Clicking opens competitor-brief-panel (slide-over)
  
  Platform presence distribution gap:
    "Keyridge is not listed on Hargreaves Lansdown.
     4 of 5 key competitors are."
    This sentence: amber text, body, font-semibold.
    Below: platform bar list showing competitor counts.
  
  Competitor Brief Panel (slide-over, 400px, right):
    Sections per MASTER.md spec
    Battlecard section: bg-accent-subtle, border-l-2 amber
    3 talking points, each < 25 words

Layer 2: status="building" quarterLabel="Q2 2026"
Layer 3: status="licensed" 
  licenseProvider={["Defaqto"]}

**3c. app/intelligence/partnership-intelligence/page.tsx**

State:
  searchQuery: string
  selectedPartnership: Partnership | null
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3

Layer 1 content:
  Search bar (full width, prominent)
  Suggested partnerships as chips below search:
    "JPMorgan + True Potential"
    "Schroders + Benchmark Capital"  
    "Columbia Threadneedle + Openwork"
  
  Default state: 3 partnership cards, collapsed (2 lines each)
  
  When partnership selected (default: JPM + True Potential):
    Full anatomy card:
      4-section 2×2 grid: Trigger, Mandate Fit, 
      People Catalyst, Outcome
      Per MASTER.md spec. Amber left border on Trigger section.
    
    Below anatomy:
      "Firms matching this pre-partnership profile today"
      Compact table: 8 firms with match score and signal
      Each row: "Build Outreach" ghost button
  
Layer 2: status="building" quarterLabel="Q3 2026"
Layer 3: status="licensed"
  licenseProvider={["LinkedIn Sales Navigator", "Defaqto"]}

**3d. app/intelligence/market-intelligence/page.tsx**

State:
  selectedEvent: MarketEvent (default: BoE rate hold)
  isDraftOpen: boolean
  draftContext: string
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3

Layer 1 content:
  Two-column layout (40/60):
  
  LEFT: Event feed
    Section heading + pulsing green dot + "Live" text
    8 event items, scrollable
    Selected event: amber left border + bg-raised
    Click event to select and show in right column
    
  RIGHT: Mapped intelligence
    Event summary card (headline + 2-sentence context)
    
    Mandate relevance:
      "3 Keyridge mandates are directly relevant"
      3 mandate cards: name + why relevant + badge + button
      DEFENSIVE/OFFENSIVE/NEUTRAL badges per spec
    
    IFA Outreach Intelligence:
      Table: 5 IFAs with reason + mandate + Draft button
      Draft button → opens outreach-draft-modal

Layer 2: status="building" quarterLabel="Q2 2026"
Layer 3: status="licensed"
  licenseProvider={["Salesforce / DealCloud", 
    "Portfolio Management System"]}

**3e. app/intelligence/ai-research/page.tsx**

State:
  query: string
  isLoading: boolean
  result: ResearchResult | null
  queryHistory: {query, timestamp, resultType}[]
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3
  resultType: "list" | "brief" | "comparison" | null

Layer 1 content:
  Large query input (52px height, full width minus submit)
  Submit button: amber, "Research" label + Search icon
  
  Suggested query chips (8 chips, wrapping):
    Per MASTER.md spec
  
  Query history (left of results or above if empty):
    Last 5 queries with timestamp (Geist Mono)
    
  Result area:
    Empty state: centred placeholder text
    
    Loading state: opacity pulse on result skeleton
      Show result card shape with pulsing opacity
      "Researching..." caption, Geist Mono, text-tertiary
    
    Result state (mock — hardcode result for 
    default query "Who should we target for Global 
    Systematic in the South East?"):
      Query shown in section-heading
      "Result generated in 8.2s · Sources: 4 data sources"
      
      Result type: TYPE 1 (ranked list)
      Compact table: 8 IFA firms, rank, fit score, 
        key signal
      "Download as CSV" ghost button
      "Refine this query" smaller input below
      "Generate outreach brief" amber ghost button

Layer 2: status="building" quarterLabel="Q2 2026"
Layer 3: status="licensed"
  licenseProvider={["Connected data sources (all modules)"]}

**3f. app/intelligence/platform-flow/page.tsx**

State:
  activeLayer: 1 | 2 | 3 (default 1)
  activeFlowPeriod: "MTD" | "QTD" | "YTD" | "12M" (default "12M")
  selectedPlatform: string | null

Layer 1 content:
  4 headline stats (same stat-card component):
    IA Global sector QTD: −£2.1bn (danger delta)
    IA Mixed Investment QTD: +£847m (success delta)
    UK net retail sales March: −£1.4bn (danger)
    Platforms growing AUM: 8 of 18 (neutral)
  
  Two charts (50/50):
    Left: IA Sector Flow bar chart (12 months)
      Horizontal grouped bars or vertical bars per month
      Multiple IA sectors, colour-coded
      Per MASTER.md chart spec
    Right: Platform AUM bar list (8 platforms)
      Horizontal bar list with QoQ delta
      
  Platform Distribution Gap table:
    8 platforms × 5 mandates (ticks and crosses)
    Amber background on gap rows (HL, AJ Bell)
    ✓: success-text, ✗: danger-text
    
  Gap callout card below table:
    "2 priority platform gaps: HL and AJ Bell —
     both growing, both carrying 4 competitors 
     without Keyridge."
    Amber border-left card. Body-sm. Specific numbers 
    in Geist Mono.

Layer 2: status="building" quarterLabel="Q3 2026"
  Children preview: inferred flow direction per platform

Layer 3: status="licensed"
  licenseProvider={["Calastone (commercial licence)", 
    "FE fundinfo Finscape / Nexus (commercial licence)"]}
  Additional context:
    "These are the two primary providers of UK platform 
     flow data. Calastone processes 85%+ of UK fund 
     transactions. Licensing discussions should begin 
     once core product is validated with paying customers."
  This is the most commercially sensitive explanation 
  in the product. It shows sophistication, not limitation.

---

## PHASE 4: ROUTE STRUCTURE

Create directory structure:
app/intelligence/
  ifa-prioritisation/page.tsx
  competitive-positioning/page.tsx
  partnership-intelligence/page.tsx
  market-intelligence/page.tsx
  platform-flow/page.tsx
  ai-research/page.tsx

Each page.tsx exports a default React component.
All 6 pages use the existing app/layout.tsx shell.
No new layout files needed.

---

## PHASE 5: VERIFICATION

5a. npm run build — zero TypeScript errors.

5b. Navigation check:
    Sidebar shows three sections: OVERVIEW / INTELLIGENCE / SYSTEM INTEGRATIONS
    INTELLIGENCE section has "BETA" badge
    All 6 new nav items present with correct icons
    All 6 link to correct routes
    All existing nav items still work (no regressions)

5c. Module check (visit each page):
    Module header: title, description, "Public Data Only" badge, 
      "Data Sources" button
    Layer tabs: all 3 tabs visible, Layer 1 active by default
    Layer 1 content: fully rendered with mock data
    Layer 2 content: greyed overlay with "Building" message
    Layer 3 content: locked card with provider names
    Data freshness strip: visible at bottom

5d. Component check:
    Layer status badges: all 3 variants render correctly
    Data Sources panel: opens and closes
    Outreach Draft modal: opens from IFA Prioritisation 
      and Market Intelligence modules
    Platform gap table: ✓ and ✗ render in correct colours

5e. Design check:
    No raw hex values or raw Tailwind colour defaults
    Geist Mono on all data values in all 6 modules
    Amber accent used sparingly per MASTER.md rules
    "Public Data Only" badge visible on every module header
    Layer 3 Calastone/FE fundinfo explanation (Platform Flow) 
      reads as strategic, not apologetic

5f. IFA Prioritisation specific:
    "10,847 IFAs in universe" visible in stats strip
    "23 have new signals this week" in amber
    All 25 IFA rows rendered with fit scores and signals
    Row expansion works showing 3-column detail panel
    
5g. Platform Flow specific:
    Distribution gap table renders correctly
    HL and AJ Bell rows highlighted amber
    Gap callout card visible below table
    Layer 3 Calastone explanation complete

---

## COMPLETION CRITERIA

Output <promise>COMPLETE</promise> only when ALL pass:

□ npm run build passes, zero errors
□ All 6 Intelligence module pages render
□ Navigation restructure complete (3 sections, BETA badge, 
  6 new items, SYSTEM INTEGRATIONS renamed)
□ Layer status system works on all 6 modules 
  (Live / Building / Licensed states all render)
□ "Public Data Only" badge visible on every module header
□ Data Sources panel opens on all 6 modules
□ Outreach Draft modal works on IFA Prioritisation 
  and Market Intelligence
□ IFA Prioritisation: 25 ranked firms, expandable rows
□ Competitive Positioning: peer group table + 
  battlecard slide-over working
□ Platform Flow: distribution gap table with HL/AJ Bell 
  highlighted + Layer 3 Calastone explanation
□ All existing pages (Morning Brief, Priority Queue, etc.)
  still render correctly (zero regressions)
□ No raw Tailwind colour defaults or hex values
□ Geist Mono on all data throughout all 6 modules

If any criterion fails: continue.
Ralph mode: the boulder rolls until all criteria are met.]
